runs.text: Section 01 sets the frame for routine operational tasks [section:01].

runs.user_prompt: What does Section 02 require for record retention?
runs.text: Section 02 requires retention for the period mandated by policy [section:02].

runs.user_prompt: If an employee forgets manager sign-off, which section applies?
runs.text: Section 02 covers sign-off and retention obligations [section:02].
